warningSigns.question: Do you have a mole or skin spot that is new, growing, changing shape or colour, bleeding, or not healing?

yes.title: Yes
yes.description: I have noticed a change or unusual spot.

no.title: No
no.description: Nothing new or changing that I have noticed.

unsure.title: Not sure
unsure.description: I may have noticed something but I am not certain.

previousDiagnosis.question: Have you previously been diagnosed with any form of skin cancer?
previousDiagnosis.description: Includes melanoma, basal cell carcinoma (BCC), squamous cell carcinoma (SCC), or any precancerous skin lesion removed by a doctor.

yes.title: Yes
yes.description: I've been diagnosed with skin cancer or had a precancerous lesion removed.

no.title: No
no.description: I haven't been diagnosed with any form of skin cancer.
